productName: Ooowee - JUICED 1G Hydrocarbon Concentrate - Blueberry Dream - Sour Gum - 1g
description: A workhorse sativa dab: Blueberry Dream run through a closed-loop butane extraction and finished to a smooth, high-potency concentrate. Smooth and high-potency, with notes of blueberry, berry, and sweet, leading into a bright, heady lift.
